summary: The old archive version works okay, though reviewers give no detail on the show's musical or recording specifics.
review: Only a single five‑star comment was provided, expressing satisfaction with the existing archive file and curiosity about a newer release. No information is given about sound quality, source type, setlist, or individual performances.

ai_rating.rationale: The lone review is enthusiastic (5 stars) but offers no concrete details on performance or audio quality, limiting the ability to assess the show comprehensively.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes the old archive 'works OK' but does not comment on clarity, mix, or source type.
